meaning: n.神经学者,神经科专门医师
examples: Developing self-awareness requires tuning in to what neurologist Antonio Damasio calls "gut feelings”.
Someone with suspected MS should see a neurologist specializing in the disease.
Doctor Freud was trained as a neurologist.
He also says that any claimant headed for trial is always seen by another neurologist.
Inside the brain of Kathleen Peterson, a forensic neurologist discovered the presence of red neurons.
